name: Long Fur Kids' Bean Bag Cream - Pillowfort™
description:
Offer your kiddo a cozy spot to perch on with this Long Faux-Fur Bean Bag from Pillowfort™. Boasting a faux-fur construction that feels soft to the touch, this kids' bean bag features soft filling to keep them comfy as they sit back and watch their favorite cartoons or movies, read a story book, play games or simply relax. Designed with a handle at the top for effortless movement from one spot to another. In a solid cream hue, it's easy to coordinate this bean bag seat with their existing room decor.

Diameter: 31 inches
Overall Height: 15 inches
